name: Stripe
description: The de-facto standard for indie payment processing. Best-in-class docs, instant payouts, global coverage. Higher fees than competitors but saves weeks of integration work.

name: Lemon Squeezy
tagline: Merchant of Record for software companies
description: Handles global tax compliance so you don't have to. Ideal for solo founders selling digital products or SaaS who want zero VAT headaches. Slightly higher fees than Stripe but saves hours of compliance work.

name: Paddle
description: Merchant of Record with stronger subscription tooling than Lemon Squeezy. Better for higher-volume SaaS. More enterprise-grade but overkill for early-stage.

name: Plausible
description: Lightweight script under 1KB, GDPR-compliant by default, no cookie banner needed. Solo-founder favourite — one dashboard with everything you actually need.

name: Fathom Analytics
description: GDPR/CCPA compliant. Slightly pricier than Plausible but has a 25% recurring affiliate program — very popular in the indie community for that reason.

name: Vercel
description: Zero-config deployment for Next.js and any frontend framework. Free tier is generous. GitHub push to live in 30 seconds. The default choice for solo founders shipping fast.

name: Netlify
tagline: The fastest way to build and deploy websites
description: Strong alternative to Vercel, especially for non-Next.js projects. Excellent form handling and serverless functions. Free tier is generous.

name: Railway
description: The easiest way to run a backend or database. No Kubernetes, no YAML hell. Deploy from GitHub in minutes. Postgres, Redis, MySQL all one-click.

name: Supabase
description: Postgres + Auth + Storage + Edge Functions. The default backend stack for solo founders who want to move fast. Free tier is very generous for early products.

name: Cursor
description: VSCode fork with deep AI integration. Tab-completion, multi-file editing, natural language diffs. The most adopted AI coding tool among indie founders in 2026.

name: GitHub Copilot
description: Deepest IDE integration across all editors. Best for inline completions. Less capable than Cursor for multi-file refactors but more stable.

name: Beehiiv
description: Best newsletter platform for monetization-focused builders. Built-in referral program, boosts, ad network. Free tier up to 2,500 subscribers.

name: Typefully
tagline: Write and schedule Twitter threads that grow
description: The best tool for solo founders who use Twitter/X for distribution. Thread composer, scheduling, analytics. Many indie hackers swear by it for building in public.

name: Resend
description: The cleanest transactional email API. React Email component library, excellent deliverability, generous free tier of 3,000 emails/mo. The new default for indie SaaS.

name: Postmark
description: Industry-leading deliverability. Best choice when email reliability is mission-critical. Pricier than Resend but more mature with better inbox rates.

name: Crisp
description: Live chat + inbox + knowledge base + chatbot. Free tier for 2 seats is very usable for solo founders. Replaces Intercom at 1/10th the cost.

name: Tally
description: Notion-like form builder. Free tier is remarkably generous — unlimited forms, submissions, file uploads. Perfect for feedback forms, user research, support tickets.

name: Clerky
description: Automated Delaware C-Corp formation, SAFEs, NDAs. Used by YC founders. Cheaper than a lawyer, more reliable than LegalZoom. Essential if you plan to raise.

name: Termly
tagline: Privacy policy and compliance made easy
description: Auto-generate GDPR/CCPA compliant privacy policies, terms of service, cookie banners. Free tier covers most early-stage needs.

name: Figma
description: The standard design tool. Free tier is sufficient for solo founders. Massive template library. Figma-to-code plugins now make design-to-implementation faster than ever.

name: Canva
description: Marketing graphics, social media posts, presentations, logos. Faster than Figma for non-UI work. Free tier is excellent.

name: Linear
tagline: The issue tracker for high-performance teams
description: Fastest issue tracker. Even better solo — keyboard-first, lightning speed, clean design. Free tier. Many indie founders switched from Notion to Linear for task management.

name: Notion
tagline: The connected workspace for your notes and docs
description: All-in-one workspace: notes, docs, databases, wikis. Many solo founders run their entire business in Notion. Slower than Linear for task tracking but far more flexible.
